title: Care workforce pathway for adult social care (easy read)
body: "There are 8 groups of jobs in adult social care in England.  ‘Adult social care’ means helping people who have disabilities or who are ill for a long time.  The first booklet on this page tells you what people working in care need so they can do this important work.  The next 8 booklets tell you about each of the job groups in adult social care.   There is more detailed information on the non-easy read version of the page.   "

taxons.title: Careers in health and social care
